title: MonkeyLib538
description: A library mod for OffsetMonkey538's mods
body:
# MonkeyLib538
[![Chat with me on Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.offsetmonkey538.top/)
[![Available on Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/monkeylib538)
[![Check out the Repository](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/git_vector.svg)](https://git.offsetmonkey538.top/OffsetMods538/MonkeyLib538)

Make sure to download the correct version for the Minecraft version you're using!

A library mod used by OffsetMonkey538's mods. Required for them to run.  
Includes very fun abstractions for allowing easier support of multiple mod loaders and Minecraft versions.  
Also abstracts away the platform specifics of [Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api), [Placeholder API NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api-neoforge), and [Placeholder API Paper](https://modrinth.com/project/placeholder-api-paper).

###### This mod collects anonymous usage statistics, read more about what's collected [here](https://monkeylib538.docs.offsetmonkey538.top/reference/telemetry/). No personally identifiable data is stored. Telemetry can be disabled by modifying the config at `config/monkeylib538/telemetry.json` or by running the `/monkeylib538 telemetry set isEnabled false` command.
